SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_BLASTKNUCKLES_DESC: Ut Loader, interfice teleporter ducem uno ictu.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CRYPTICSOURCE_DESC: Ut Mercenary, completa 3 teleporters Aethereos in uno cursu.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_HOTTESTSAUCE_DESC: Porta Kjaro's Band, Gasoline, et Will-o'-the-wisp omnes simul.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_HUNTERSSIGIL_DESC: Inflige 1000 aut plus vulnus uno ictu critico.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_INSECTICIDE_DESC: Ut REX, interfice Elitum Scarabaei Reginam.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_FIELDACCELERATOR_DESC: Ut Artificer, interfice Teleporter ducem cum Nano-Bomb ex 100m procul.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_MALICE_DESC: Completa Eventum Teleporter Stadii 3 in difficultate Typhoon.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NKOTASHERITAGE_DESC: Porta 25 unicas res in uno cursu.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_STICKYOVERLOADER_DESC: Ut MUL-T, collige 20 res virides in uno cursu.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_UNIVERSALCHARGER_DESC: Ut Engineer, interfice 400 hostes cum tuis turribus.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_URANIUMHORSESHOE_DESC: Ut Bandit, completa stadium 3 in minus quam 15 minutis in difficultate Typhoon.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_WEATHERRADIO_DESC: Ut Commando, interfice Stormborn ducem in difficultate Monsoon.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_X4_DESC: Ut Huntress, interfice 7 unicos duces in uno cursu.
